options.name: -check_m2_only
options.description: check M2 to M2 pins only in abutted 2 cells when generating cell edge constraints

options.name: -check_m2_to_m1_only
options.description: check M2 to M1 pins only in abutted 2 cells when generating cell edge constraints

options.name: -file
options.description: specify file name to output vertical tcl constraint
